name: ExlService Holdings, Inc.
summary: ExlService Holdings, Inc. (EXL, we, us, our or the Company), incorporated in Delaware in 2002, is a global data and artificial intelligence (AI) company that offers services and solutions to reinvent client business models, drive better outcomes and unlock growth with speed. EXL harnesses the power of data, AI, and deep industry knowledge to transform businesses, including the worlds leading corporations in industries including insurance, healthcare and life sciences, banking and capital markets...
